name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
description: Licensed action franchise starring the four Turtles across arcade beat 'em ups, console action games, and fighting games.

eras.title: Konami Classic Era
eras.description: Arcade, NES, handheld, SNES, and Genesis games developed during the original TMNT boom.

eras.title: Modern Revival Era
eras.description: Modern revival period led by Shredder's Revenge and classic-game preservation.
